title: Risk management system
description: Article 9. Providers of high-risk AI systems must establish, implement, document and maintain a risk management system across the lifecycle.

title: Data and data governance
description: Article 10. Training, validation, and test datasets shall be relevant, representative, free of errors, complete, and properly documented.

title: Transparency to deployers
description: Article 13. Providers must give deployers concise, complete, correct, and clear information about the AI system.

title: Human oversight
description: Article 14. High-risk AI systems shall be designed and developed so that they can be effectively overseen by humans.

title: Accuracy robustness cybersecurity
description: Article 15. Appropriate level of accuracy, robustness, and cybersecurity throughout the lifecycle.

title: Transparency obligations for GP AI
description: Article 50. General-purpose AI providers — model card, training summary, copyright compliance documentation.
